title: OG-Ores Unified
description: Bringing the classic look back to the ores.
body:
**Note: Not to be confused with [OG Ores: Reborn](https://privateme.neocities.org/projects/ogoresreborn/) by [PrivateMe](https://privateme.neocities.org/)**

![OG-Ores Unified promo logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ab13f0f385a730525d6121ac61d73c0ea6c7340.png)
# OG-Ores Unified
This is OG-Ores Unified. The continuation of the OG-Ores project (2021) in a single repository, with updates.
OG-Ores Unified brings the classic ore look to modern Minecraft.
![Display with "OG-Ores Unified" in the center](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da6fc359ee932b04a4284f242c7fb25ef19a985c.png)
The project supplies four resource pack files. (Listed in order according to the diagram below.)
1. OG-Ores Unified (Standard)
2. OG-Ores Unified Extension (Adds a copper ore in the vanilla ore style)
3. OG-Ores Unified Nether Gold (classic-style Nether Gold ore)
4. OG-Ores Unified Nether Quartz (old Nether Quartz ore interposed onto the new Netherrack texture)
5. OG-Ores Unified Extension Bordered (Adds the styled copper ore with the border.)
6. OG-Ores Unified Bordered (Ores have a 1-pixel border around them.)

![Showcase of provided textures and vanilla textures for comparison.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e613c3fa0b5abff233dc9d72a5c9403e45847784.png)

## Other, Similar Projects
I do not endorse or affiliate with these, but please take a look to see which one is best for you.

### Vanilla Tweaks
- [Vanilla Tweaks Website](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)  (under the "Retro" section)

### OG Ores: Reborn
- [OG Ores: Reborn](https://privateme.neocities.org/projects/ogoresreborn/) by [PrivateMe](https://privateme.neocities.org/)
- At [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/og-ores-reborn) and [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/og-ores-reborn/)

### Various other Modrinth Packs:
- "[Classic Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/classic-ores)"
- "[Old Ore Textures (With Copper)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/old-ores-copper)"
- "[Old Ores for Java](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/old-ores-for-java)"

- ...and probably more!
